title: 'We’ll knock them out harder': Trump warns Iran of harsher military action after 3 US ships came under fire in Hormuz
summary_full: President Donald Trump claimed three US destroyers were fired upon in the Strait of Hormuz but suffered no damage, stating Iranian attackers were destroyed. He issued a strong warning to Iran, threatening more violent military action if a deal is not signed quickly, calling the nation 'lunatics'.
